message:
Add remote SSH execution support to SessionOrchestrator (bd-3un3t)

- Add NewRemoteSessionOrchestrator() and NewRemoteSessionOrchestratorWithDelay()
  constructors for creating orchestrators that execute via SSH
- Add IsRemote() and RemoteHost() methods for checking remote configuration
- Add TestConnection() to verify SSH connectivity and tmux availability
- Add VerifyRemoteTmux() to check remote tmux installation with version
- Add RemoteConnectionInfo struct and GetRemoteConnectionInfo() for diagnostics
- Add comprehensive tests for all remote functionality (12 new tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
